headline: U.S. Bank Launches Enhanced Payments to Help Small Businesses Move Money Quickly and More Affordably
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, July 08, 2026--U.S. Bank today announced the launch of Enhanced Payments, a new bundled solution that helps small business owners move money quickly and more affordably – directly within U.S. Bank online banking and the bank’s mobile app.
